# Gold Analytics

Draft and publish analytics-facing models, KPIs, semantic-layer artefacts, and governed graduation flows.

## kiri design

Draft a ReportingGoal from a...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri design [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--goal-file` | Markdown file containing the business question (freeform text). | yes |  |  |
| `--project` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--name` | Override the AI-proposed name (filename stem). | no |  |  |
| `--domain` | Preferred business domain (e.g. 'customer'). | no |  |  |
| `--write`, `--no-write` | Write to <project>/models/gold/<name>.yml. | no | False |  |
| `--overwrite`, `--no-overwrite` | Overwrite an existing goal file. | no | False |  |
| `--allow-stub` | Explicitly allow audited skeleton output when the AI gateway is unconfigured. | no | False |  |

## kiri kpi

KPI lineage + freshness lookups for execs...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri kpi [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

None.

### Subcommands

- [`kiri kpi describe`](#kiri-kpi-describe) - Show a KPI's lineage, owner, freshness,...
- [`kiri kpi list`](#kiri-kpi-list) - List every KPI name discoverable in the...

### kiri kpi describe

Show a KPI's lineage, owner, freshness,...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri kpi describe [OPTIONS] NAME
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `NAME` | KPI name (snake_case). | yes |  |  |

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project root. | no |  |  |
| `--target` | Environment target for freshness lookup. | no |  |  |
| `--format` | Output format: text \| json. | no | text |  |
| `--no-freshness` | Skip the manifest read (faster; freshness=unknown). | no | False |  |

### Examples

```bash
kiri kpi describe customer_churn --no-freshness
```

```bash
kiri kpi describe revenue
```

```bash
kiri kpi describe revenue --format json
```

```text
Usage: kiri semantic [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

None.

None.

- [`kiri semantic apply`](#kiri-semantic-apply) - Apply gold semantic models to Unity...
- [`kiri semantic sync`](#kiri-semantic-sync) - Emit semantic-layer YAML from...
- [`kiri semantic verify`](#kiri-semantic-verify) - Diff live Unity Catalog Metric Views...

### kiri semantic apply

Apply gold semantic models to Unity...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri semantic apply [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--backend` | Apply backend. Only 'databricks-metric-views' is live-applyable today. | yes |  |  |
| `--target` | Named target from kiri.yml (defaults to default_target). | no |  |  |
| `--no-dry-run` | Execute the CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW â€¦ WITH METRICS DDL against the live target. Requires KIRIMANA_SEMANTIC_VIEWS_LIVE=1 and a unity-catalog target; otherwise downgrades to dry-run. | no | False |  |
| `--project` | Project root. | no |  |  |

### kiri semantic sync

Emit semantic-layer YAML from...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri semantic sync [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--backend` | Semantic-layer backend. Supported: cube, metricflow, databricks-metric-views | yes |  |  |
| `--project` | Project root. | no |  |  |
| `--output`, `-o` | File to write the semantic-layer YAML to. Defaults to stdout (for piping into dbt sl / cube deploy). | no |  |  |
| `--target` | Named target from kiri.yml (defaults to default_target). Only used by --backend databricks-metric-views to read the runtime's metric_views_emit_capable flag. | no |  |  |

### kiri semantic verify

Diff live Unity Catalog Metric Views...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri semantic verify [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--backend` | Verify backend. Only 'databricks-metric-views' is supported today. | yes |  |  |
| `--target` | Named target from kiri.yml (defaults to default_target). | no |  |  |
| `--fail-on` | Closed menu: 'missing', 'stale', or 'all'. Findings of this kind cause exit code 1. | no | all |  |
| `--output`, `-o` | Write the JSON report here (default stdout). | no |  |  |
| `--project` | Project root. | no |  |  |

None.

None.

### kiri suggest gold

Draft a gold dbt model for one fact or...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri suggest gold [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--goal` | ReportingGoal name (under models/gold/) | yes |  |  |
| `--project` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--fact` | Fact name from the goal's spec.facts. One of --fact/--dim required. | no |  |  |
| `--dim` | Dimension name from the goal's spec.dimensions. | no |  |  |
| `--scd-type` | SCD type for --dim: type_1 \| type_2 \| type_3 \| type_7. Default type_1 for safety - bump to type_2 when you need history. Ignored for --fact. | no | type_1 |  |
| `--surrogate-key-strategy` | For --dim: hash \| sequence \| natural. Defaults match the project's silver technique (DVâ†’hash, kimballâ†’sequence, flatâ†’hash). | no | hash |  |
| `--fact-kind` | For --fact: transaction \| periodic_snapshot \| accumulating_snapshot \| factless_fact. Default transaction. Ignored for --dim. | no | transaction |  |
| `--write`, `--no-write` | Save under <project>/models/gold/ as <goal>__<name>.sql. | no | False |  |
| `--overwrite`, `--no-overwrite` | Overwrite an existing gold model file. | no | False |  |
| `--allow-stub` | Explicitly allow audited template output when the AI gateway is unconfigured. | no | False |  |

### kiri suggest silver

Draft a silver dbt model from a bronze table.

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri suggest silver [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--target`, `-t` | Named profile to use (dev\|test\|prod). Falls back to KIRIMANA_TARGET or the project's default_target. | no |  |  |
| `--source` | Source name | yes |  |  |
| `--table` | Table name | yes |  |  |
| `--goal` | Optional ReportingGoal name; when set, its question + entities enrich the prompt. | no |  |  |
| `--entity` | Business entity name inside the goal (e.g. 'customer'). Pass with --goal to scope the context. | no |  |  |
| `--materialization` | Silver materialization: auto \| table \| view \| incremental. `auto` asks the AI to pick based on row count. | no | auto |  |
| `--historize` | History strategy: none \| scd2. SCD2 requires --grain and append-only bronze. | no | none |  |
| `--grain` | Comma-separated business-key columns. Required when --historize=scd2. | no |  |  |
| `--version-column` | Column that orders SCD2 versions per grain. Default `_kiri_ingested_at`. | no | _kiri_ingested_at |  |
| `--delta` | Emit file_format='delta' on the dbt config - physical time travel via VERSION AS OF. Works on Databricks + Fabric natively; on dbt-duckdb may no-op or fail at build time. | no | False |  |
| `--write`, `--no-write` | Save to <project>/models/silver/<source>__<table>.sql (default: print only). | no | False |  |
| `--overwrite`, `--no-overwrite` | Overwrite an existing silver model file. | no | False |  |
| `--allow-stub` | Explicitly allow audited template output when the AI gateway is unconfigured. | no | False |  |

### kiri suggest tests

Draft dbt-core data tests (not_null /...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri suggest tests [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--target`, `-t` | Named profile to use (dev\|test\|prod). Falls back to KIRIMANA_TARGET or the project's default_target. | no |  |  |

| `--table` | Table name | yes |  |  |
| `--goal` | Optional ReportingGoal - its KPIs sharpen test choices. | no |  |  |
| `--sample-rows` | Number of bronze rows to sample for the AI. 0 disables. | no | 5 |  |
| `--write`, `--no-write` | Save as <project>/models/silver/<source>__<table>.yml. | no | False |  |
| `--overwrite`, `--no-overwrite` | Overwrite an existing tests file. | no | False |  |
| `--allow-stub` | Explicitly allow audited skeleton output when the AI gateway is unconfigured. | no | False |  |
